mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate below 1.0% signals monetary accommodation that reduces equity discount rates and increases present value of future corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive 20-day forward returns occur in less than 55% of instances when FEDFUNDS < 1.0%.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 6.5%, it signals labor market deterioration that increases recession probability and triggers equity risk-off positioning, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as portfolio rebalancing accelerates.
failure_condition: Negative 5-day forward returns occur in fewer than 58% of instances when UNRATE > 6.5%, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any rolling 18-month window.

mechanism_narrative: A joint contraction in retail sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) signals weakening aggregate demand that reduces corporate revenue expectations and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: both RSAFS and HOUST decline month-over-month simultaneously
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST at 1415k units, RSAFS at 549256M dollars
failure_condition: Negative 60-day forward returns occur in fewer than 60% of triggered instances, or the interaction effect (joint decline) shows no statistical significance (p > 0.10) in multivariate regression over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) growth above 102.0 signals robust supply-side capacity utilization that supports corporate profit margins and equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns occur in fewer than 56% of instances when INDPRO > 102.0, or Rank IC < 0.025 over any rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment (PAYEMS) growth decelerating below 100k new jobs per month combined with rising unemployment signals labor market inflection that precedes equity drawdowns, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS month-over-month growth < 100k AND UNRATE rises > 0.2pp in prior month
failure_condition: Negative 20-day forward returns occur in fewer than 62% of triggered instances, or the joint interaction term shows no statistical significance (p > 0.08) in logistic regression over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation measured by CPIAUCSL above 265 combined with FEDFUNDS below 2.0% indicates real rates remain deeply negative, signaling monetary policy remains accommodative and supporting equity valuations through the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 60-day forward returns occur in fewer than 58% of triggered instances, or the interaction effect (negative real rates) shows Rank IC < 0.02 over any rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth (GDPC1) measured at quarterly frequency above 18600 billion chained dollars signals sustained economic expansion that supports equity earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days in expansion regimes.
failure_condition: Positive 60-day forward returns occur in fewer than 54% of periods when GDPC1 > 18600, or Rank IC < 0.015 over any rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) declining below 1400k units signals weakening residential investment demand that precedes broader economic slowdown and equity market correction, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Negative 5-day forward returns occur in fewer than 57% of instances when HOUST < 1400k, or Rank IC < 0.018 over any rolling 18-month window.
